manager.bio: The 2023 runner-up after eliminating the #1 seed MLSchools12 (13-1) in the semifinals with 154.30 points. Consistently competitive without breaking through for the title. Three playoff appearances and a near-miss at the championship.

trades.note: Paid the price for Allen before he fully became Allen. Worth every pick.
Moved off aging Tyreek for youth and draft capital. Reed has been solid.
Bought Cook for the 2023 run. Valuable, but cost a valuable pick in hindsight.
Rebuilt at RB depth while adding young receiver in Burden. Smart pivot for the next window.

rivalries.description: The 2023 championship. Eldridm20 made the final but JuicyBussy had the hotter run. Eldridm20 leads the all-time series.
Eldridm20 stunned the 13-1 MLSchools12 in the 2023 semis (154.30 pts) — the dynasty's most memorable upset.
Two consistent finishers who have never dominated one another. RBR leads narrowly.
